summary: Completed testing of iteration 51 features: Profile page BL Coins hidden, MyTeam page Daily BL Claim hidden, AuctionSettingsForm toggle labels, AuctionBidPanel localStorage token, share_to_feed feed posts, and seller privacy. All features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test listings with share_to_feed=true for feed post testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 51 features verified working: 1) Profile page BL Coins card and View Wallet button are hidden (commented out in code), 2) MyTeam page Daily BL Claim section is hidden and stats row shows only 2 columns (Direct L1 and Indirect L2), 3) AuctionSettingsForm has 'Fixed Price' and 'Auction' labels on either side of toggle, 4) AuctionBidPanel uses localStorage.getItem('blendlink_token') for Bearer token auth, 5) POST /api/marketplace/listings with share_to_feed=true creates feed_post_id, 6) Seller privacy shows @username on all marketplace listings instead of real names

feature_1_profile_bl_coins_hidden.details: BL Coins card and View Wallet button are commented out in Profile.jsx (lines 196-219). UI test confirmed they are not visible.

feature_2_myteam_daily_claim_hidden.details: DailyClaimSection is commented out in MyTeam.jsx (lines 477-485). Stats row shows only 2 columns (grid-cols-2) for Direct L1 and Indirect L2.

feature_3_auction_toggle_labels.details: AuctionSettingsForm.jsx has 'Fixed Price' label before Switch and 'Auction' label after Switch (lines 65-75). Code review confirmed correct structure.

feature_4_auction_bid_localstorage_token.details: AuctionBidPanel.jsx uses localStorage.getItem('blendlink_token') in handlePlaceBid function (line 179) and passes it as Bearer token in Authorization header (line 206).

feature_5_share_to_feed_creates_post.details: Backend API test confirmed: POST /api/marketplace/listings with share_to_feed=true returns feed_post_id. Without share_to_feed, no feed_post_id is returned.

feature_6_feed_marketplace_listing_posts.details: Feed.jsx has marketplace_listing post type rendering with listing card UI (lines 233-260). Shows Gavel icon for auctions, ShoppingBag for fixed price.

feature_7_seller_privacy_username_only.details: Marketplace listings show @username (e.g., @testuser) instead of real names. Backend applies privacy filter based on is_real_name_private setting.
